title: ASCII Art Generator
scenario: Create a prompt for an LLM to generate a high-quality ASCII art image of a given subject. The prompt should take the subject as input and output a well-formatted ASCII art image as a text string.
constraints: Must include a clear explanation of the ASCII art rendering process

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the word limit and includes a clear explanation of the ASCII art rendering process.
Check if the generated ASCII art image is visually appealing and well-formatted.
Check if the generated ASCII art image accurately represents the given subject.
